Very thorough analysis of PLC ST programs at C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\PLC\ST_OUTPUT\

Read and analyze these 2 files completely:

1. **U005_.st** (1213 lines) - Section#05 (JIG#10-11)
2. **U006_.st** (1455 lines) - Section#06 (LIFT2, JIG#12-14)

For each program, document:
1. All sections (marked by // --- comments)
2. Sensor input processing (M50xxx, X inputs, debounce timers)
3. MC status per unit
4. Memory Set logic (L20xxx for each JIG)
5. Auto Step sequences (D70xxx step registers, step values and transitions)
6. DECO destinations and bit ranges
7. M/A Output defines - what actuators each section controls
8. Physical output mapping (Y addresses)
9. Alarm/Error detection
10. Inter-section handshake signals (D701xx words)
11. How Section#5 conveyor (Y478) and Section#6 conveyor (Y47C) are controlled
12. LIFT2 operation (Up/Down, In/Out, Stopper)
13. What happens at OUT LIFT C/V (Y466/Y467) - the exit elevator

Device naming:
- SM400=always ON, SM401=always OFF
- M1080-M1099=Unit#05 MC (Section#5), M1100-M1119=Unit#06 MC (Section#6)
- M1120-M1139=Unit#07 MC (RETURN C/V - referenced in Part#1)
- L20500-L20529=JIG#10-11 memory, L20600-L20629=JIG#12-14 memory
- M6xxx=Section#5 M/A signals, M7xxx=Section#6 M/A signals
- L720/L721=Section#5 auto conveyor CW/CCW, L730/L731=Section#6

Return structured analysis with line numbers.
